title: Basketball Suitcase Tags Sports-Themed Luggage Tags for Backpack, Cool Water and Fire Design Cruise Bag Tags for Kids Boys, Small Baggage Identifiers ID Name Labels Travel Tag for Adults Children
features: Sports-themed Luggage Tags: Our sports-themed travel luggage tags for suitcases boast unique design and eye-catching color, simple but stylish. If you are a sports lover, these suitcase tags with printed all kinds of balls(baseball, basketball, soccer) patthen is a very good choice. They are very suitable for kids teens boys girls adults women men who like sports.

Quality Material & Printing: This suitcase tag is made of PVC material, durable, light weight. And the luggage tag is full-frame printing, single-sided printing, and the printed patterns are colorful, bright and not easy to fade. Our distinctive bag tags help you search for your suitcase effortlessly from the sea of ordinary baggages. Easily spot your luggage among the numerous luggages at airports or on a cruise ships.

Small Tag: 8.5 cm X 5.4 cm (3.3 x 2.1 Inch), cute size and light weight, and it is equipped with a detachable wrist strap for easy convenient to carry on any bags such as sports bag, lunch bag, kids backpack, luggage bag, golf ball bag, gym bag, tool box, pet bag and more.

Personal Information: There is a personal information card on the back of the personalised luggage tag, where you can fill in your relevant information to avoid loss of luggage and prevent confusion when checking in luggage.

Multiple Uses: This luggage tag can be used with suitcases, travel bags, gym bags, sports bags, children's school bags, lunch bag, briefcases, golf bags, trolleys or musical instrument covers, etc. It is also a ideal gift or souvenir for girls, boys, teens, youth, women, men, friends, colleagues and families on various occasions such as Birthdays, Valentine's Day, Father's and Mother's Day, Weddings, Christmas, Thanksgiving.
description: Specification: Size: 3.3 X 2.1 inches (8.5cm X 5.4cm ) Package Included: 1 luggage tag ➤ Connected with a durable plastic wrist strap, detachable, easy to install and remove the tags from your luggage or bag.
